seo.title: AI Consulting & Development | SSW
seo.description: Custom AI & Machine Learning solutions in Sydney, Brisbane, Melbourne & Newcastle. We develop bespoke AI applications tailored to your business workflows and data requirements.

blocks.heading: Want to revolutionize your business with **GPT** and **ChatGPT** integration?
blocks.description: Unlock the power of language AI for your business

blocks.heading: Trusted in Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, and Newcastle by
Experience the advantages of implementing **GPT** and **ChatGPT**
blocks.description:
Integrating GPT and ChatGPT enables intelligent, human-like automation for customer service, content, and data tasks, boosting efficiency and user experience.

Want an example? Try the chatbot in the bottom right corner of your screen!

mediaConfiguration.altText: The Future of Business with AI: Automation, Intelligence, and Customer Relations | Ulysses Maclaren (10 mins)

cards.heading: Transform Your Business Communication
cards.description: Use GPT to automate customer support, streamline internal communication, and enhance collaboration within your team. These AI models can understand and generate human-like responses, allowing you to provide a seamless and efficient experience for your customers and employees.

cards.heading: Optimize Your Workflows
cards.description: With GPT your business can automate repetitive tasks, freeing up valuable time for your team to focus on more strategic and creative endeavors. The AI models can be customized to suit your unique business needs, helping you achieve optimal efficiency and productivity.

embeddedButton.buttonText: For an example of this see: YakShaver

cards.heading: Expand Your Product Offerings
cards.description: Integrating GPT into your existing products or creating new AI-driven solutions can help your business stay ahead of the competition. Our team of experts will work closely with you to develop innovative applications that harness the power of language AI for the benefit of your customers and stakeholders.

cards.heading: Customized Training and Support
cards.description: We provide tailored training sessions and ongoing support to help you maximize the benefits of GPT integration. Our experienced team will guide you through the process, ensuring that you can fully utilize these cutting-edge AI technologies to drive your business success.

blocks.heading: Boosting Payroll Expertise with a **Custom AI Chatbot**
blocks.description: French Payroll Expert (FPE) spent too much time answering the same questions about French labor law. We built them a custom AI chatbot that delivers accurate, multilingual answers 24/7, directly from official sources.

features.heading: Instant Answers, Any Language
features.description: Clients get fast, 24/7 payroll answers in their own language. The AI uses verified French legislation, breaking down barriers.

features.heading: AI Becomes a Selling Point
features.description: The chatbot isn't just support, it's a competitive edge that helped FPE attract new clients and win more business.

blocks.heading: Tech Wisdom from the Trenches
blocks.body: At SSW, we’ve been knee-deep in projects for years: debugging giant solutions, fixing game-stopping bugs, and staying on the cutting edge. No guesswork, just proven tips that help you build better software.

cards.heading: If you think AI is cheating, you're doing it wrong!
cards.description: AI is the tool of this generation, but are we using it responsibly? Ulysses Maclaren dives into the best practices for AI use - covering transparency, critical thinking, data privacy, and how to leverage AI to boost productivity. Learn why using AI intelligently is the key to staying ahead in your career.

cards.heading: The Year of the AI Agent: Automation to Intelligence
cards.description: Dive into the future of AI with Ulysses Maclaren in this insightful SSW User Group session! Explore the exciting shift from automation to true AI intelligence and discover what the year of the AI agent holds for developers.

cards.heading: 3 Creative Uses for OpenAI API
cards.description: From smart home automation to content generation, he unveils three groundbreaking ideas that leverage the power of AI. Discover how chat GPT can output commands and instructions for other systems, making your home smarter and more efficient. Witness the potential of automated content generation and its impact on your productivity. Get inspired and join the future of innovation!

cards.heading: Create a Killer Chatbot with OpenAI
cards.description: Discover the power of the OpenAI API, its ability to generate intelligent responses, and the step-by-step process of building effective chatbots. Enhance user experience and save time by harnessing the natural language processing capabilities of ChatGPT.

cards.heading: The Only ChatGPT Cheat Sheet You'll Ever Need
cards.description: As ChatGPT becomes increasingly popular, users are discovering the most effective ways to prompt the AI for different scenarios. One way to compile this information is by putting it in easy to read graphics called cheat sheets. Cheat sheets can spark ideas that you would not have otherwise thought of!

cards.heading: How to supercharge a company with AI
cards.description: Supercharge your company with AI!  🚀  See how SSW transformed their business and Tina CMS using practical AI strategies, from customer support chatbots to AI-powered product features.  Discover actionable tips to implement AI

blocks.heading: Talk to Us About Your AI Project Today
blocks.description: Connect with our Account Managers to discuss how we can help.
